title: Maalai En Vethanai Song Lyrics Sethu
stanzas:
Maalai en vedhanai kootuthadi
kadhal than velaiyai kaatuthadi

enai vaattum velai yaenadi
nee solvaai kanmani
mugam kaattu en pournami
en kadhal veenai nee

vedhanai sollidum raagathile
veguthe en manam mogathile

Maalai en vedhanai kootuthadi
kadhal than velaiyai kaatuthadi

Kadhalil thoatravar
kadhai undu ingae aaryiram.
vendaathan pechukkal
yaendaa ambi!!

kadhalum poiyyum illai
unmai kadhal mannil aayiram
un kadhal suspence-u
enna ambi

kadhal senjaa paavam
andha aadhaam kaalathil
edhukku veenaa sogam
kadhaiya mudidaa nerathil

poongili kaivarum naal varuma
boomiyil sorgamum thondridumaa

Katru vidum kelvikku
malar sollum badhilum ennavo
vaasangal pesaatha
badhilaa thambi

megam vidum kelvikku
vennilavin badhil ennavo
kadal aadum alai kooda
bathilthaan thambi

avalin mounam paarthu
pathai pathaikkum en manam
vendaam ennam
varum kadhal thirumanam

Maalai en vedhanai kootuthadi
kadhal than velaiyai kaatuthadi

enai vaattum velai yaenadi
nee solvaai kanmani
mugam kaattu en pournami
en kadhal veenai nee

vedhanai sollidum raagathile
veguthe en manam mogathile

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the pain and beauty of romantic relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is featured in the movie Sethu.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Unnikrishnan.

What year was the song released?

The song was released in 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maalai En Vedhanai, the protagonist expresses his deep emotional turmoil and yearning for love, encapsulated beautifully through the poignant lyrics. The song serves as a reflection of the character's inner struggles and the complexities of romantic relationships. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This track is a perfect representation of the emotional depth found in the movie Sethu, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maalai En Vedhanai is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. The song's evocative lyrics and soothing composition resonate deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. This gem from the movie Sethu showcases the unparalleled artistry of Ilaiyaraaja and the soulful voice of Unnikrishnan, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: The evening is my pain, love shows its work.
Why do you hurt me? You speak, my dear, show your face, my full moon, you are my love's veena.
In the melody that speaks of pain, there is speed in my heart's happiness.
The evening is my pain, love shows its work.
There are stories of those who have lost in love here, oh dear!
Love is not a lie, it is true; in this world of love, your love is a suspense, oh dear.
When love is expressed, why is there sorrow in that time? Can the story end in the right moment?
Will the flower girl come to this earth, will heaven appear?
For the question that the wind asks, the flower gives an answer, but don't speak without a reply, brother.
For the question that the cloud asks, the moon gives an answer, but the waves of the sea are the reply, brother.
Seeing her silence, my heart doesn't want to be, the love that comes to me is a marriage.
The heart is filled with joy, my heart is in her lap.
The evening is my pain, love shows its work.
Why do you hurt me? You speak, my dear, show your face, my full moon, you are my love's veena.
In the melody that speaks of pain, there is speed in my heart's happiness.
